title: AN ACT TO CREATE CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOLINAO, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2830 / 55 OG No. 40, 8446 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2597, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CREATE CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOLINAO, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

The sitios of Paraguing, Manlumanat Norte, Su-maracasac, Tudo, Maro-mot, Nangadian Obe and Pocal-pocal into Barrio Tupa; and

The sitios of Bersang, Imbo as Lomboy, Dalan Sa-lumangue, Sapa Silag and Anonang into Barrio Liwa-liwa.

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
